message:
feat(db,storage): add no-op TantivyBridge stub for featureless builds and expand storage hardening

DB (lib.rs):
- Add a complete no-op search_v3 module gated behind
  #[cfg(not(feature = "tantivy-engine"))] that provides stub
  implementations of TantivyBridge, IndexableMessage, init_bridge,
  and init_or_switch_bridge. This allows the crate to compile and link
  without the tantivy-engine feature flag, returning empty search
  results instead of failing at compile time. Useful for minimal builds,
  CI, and platforms where Tantivy's C++ dependencies are unavailable.

Storage (lib.rs):
- Continued archive management improvements from concurrent agent work:
  additional path canonicalization edge cases, symlink detection
  refinements, and lock-key normalization hardening across the commit
  queue and coalescer paths (~340 lines of changes).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
